---
title: "Owner Analysis"
format: html
author: "Rachel de Sobrino"
---

## Exercise: Explore, Clean, and Wrangle Data
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

```{r}
lobster_abundance <- read_csv("../data/Lobster_Abundance_All_Years_20220829.csv")
head(lobster_abundance)
```
```{r}
lobster_clean <- lobster_abundance %>% 
  mutate(SIZE_MM = na_if(SIZE_MM, -99999))

head(lobster_clean)
```
```{r}
lobster_no_napl <- lobster_abundance %>% 
  filter(SITE != "NAPL")
head(lobster_no_napl)
```

```{r}
lobster_big_AQUE <- lobster_clean %>% 
  filter(SITE == "AQUE" & SIZE_MM > 70)

head(lobster_big_AQUE)
```
```{r}
max(lobster_abundance$SIZE_MM)

lobster_size_mon <- lobster_clean %>% 
  group_by(SIZE_MM, MONTH)

head(lobster_size_mon)
```
